questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in Houston Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in Houston Tx with weekend hours include: Psynergy Psychological Associates (Sat: 08:00-19:30), UTHealth Harris County Psychiatric Center (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Cypress Creek Hospital (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00). 3 total with weekend availability.
